sprite

payloads.hpp

Go to the documentation of this file.
00001 
00005 #pragma once
00006 #include "sprite/common.hpp"
00007 #include "sprite/pointer.hpp"
00008 
00009 namespace sprite
00010 {
00011   static size_t const PAYLOAD_BYTES = 16;
00012 
00013   namespace payloads
00014   {
00016     template<size_t Bytes = PAYLOAD_BYTES>  
00017       struct Unused { char unused[Bytes]; };
00018    
00020     template<size_t N> struct InPlace;
00021 
00023     template<> struct InPlace<0> : Unused<> {};
00024     BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(InPlace<0>) == PAYLOAD_BYTES);
00025 
00027     template<> struct InPlace<1> : Unused<PAYLOAD_BYTES-1*sizeof(NodePtr*)>
00028     {
00029       NodePtr arg;
00030       InPlace(NodePtr const & arg_) : arg(arg_) {}
00031     };
00032     BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(InPlace<1>) == PAYLOAD_BYTES);
00033 
00035     template<> struct InPlace<2> : Unused<PAYLOAD_BYTES-2*sizeof(NodePtr*)>
00036     {
00037       NodePtr arg0, arg1;
00038       InPlace(NodePtr const & arg0_, NodePtr const & arg1_)
00039         : arg0(arg0_), arg1(arg1_)
00040       {}
00041     };
00042     BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(InPlace<2>) == PAYLOAD_BYTES);
00043 
00045     struct ChildList : Unused<PAYLOAD_BYTES - sizeof(size_t) - sizeof(NodePtr*)>
00046     {
00047       // TODO copy, construct
00048       size_t n;
00049       NodePtr * children;
00050       ChildList(size_t n_) : n(n_), children(new NodePtr[n])
00051         { assert(n>2); }
00052       ~ChildList() { delete[] children; }
00053     };
00054     BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(ChildList) == PAYLOAD_BYTES);
00055 
00057     struct Choice : Unused<PAYLOAD_BYTES-2*sizeof(NodePtr)>
00058     {
00059       NodePtr lhs, rhs;
00060       Choice(NodePtr const & lhs_, NodePtr const & rhs_)
00061         : lhs(lhs_), rhs(rhs_)
00062       {}
00063     };
00064     BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(Choice) == PAYLOAD_BYTES);
00065 
00071     struct Fwd : Unused<PAYLOAD_BYTES-sizeof(NodePtr*)>
00072     {
00073       NodePtr dest;
00074       Fwd(NodePtr const & dest_) : dest(dest_) {}
00075     };
00076     BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(Fwd) == PAYLOAD_BYTES);
00077 
00079     struct Int : Unused<PAYLOAD_BYTES - sizeof(meta::ValueType<INT>::type)>
00080     { 
00081       typedef meta::ValueType<INT>::type value_type;
00082       value_type value;
00083       Int(meta::ValueType<INT>::type value_) : value(value_) {}
00084     };
00085     BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(Int) == PAYLOAD_BYTES);
00086 
00088     struct Float : Unused<PAYLOAD_BYTES - sizeof(meta::ValueType<FLOAT>::type)>
00089     { 
00090       typedef meta::ValueType<FLOAT>::type value_type;
00091       value_type value;
00092       Float(meta::ValueType<FLOAT>::type value_) : value(value_) {}
00093     };
00094     BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(Float) == PAYLOAD_BYTES);
00095   }
00096 }
